Yankees Select Yovanny Cruz
items.summary: The Yankees announced that they have selected right-hander Yovanny Cruz to their major league roster. Fellow righty Elmer Rodríguez has been optioned to Triple-A to open an active roster spot. The Yanks had a couple of 40-man vacancies, so no corresponding move is required there. Cruz, 26, was originally an international signee of the Cubs […]

items.title: Gio Urshela Announces Retirement
items.summary: Infielder Gio Urshela has announced his retirement as a player in a post on his Instagram page. In the post, he thanks the people who contributed to his career, including his family, friends, fans, baseball organizations, coaches, the people of Colombia and more. Urshela, now 34, was signed by Cleveland back in 2008. An international […]

items.title: Former Yankees third baseman Gio Urshela announces retirement
items.summary: Earlier this afternoon, former Yankee third baseman Gio Urshela took to Instagram to announce his retirement.
